programme.desc: A young beauty catches the eye of a popular Jamaican dance-hall DJ; he gives her a life of luxury, and in return, she gives him undying loyalty and love.

programme.desc: Clair, Cliff and the children plan a gala 49th anniversary party for Grandpa and Grandma Huxtable.

programme.desc: Cliff gives advice to a young man whom he would like to be Sondra's steady boyfriend.

programme.desc: Theo goes out of his way to impress one of Denise's girlfriends (Robin Givens); Cliff tries to cure his lovesick son.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Khadijah hires a new writer, a bike messenger who scoops an incredible story.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Overton's favorite uncle urges him to dump Synclaire.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max comes to regret encouraging Kyle to date other women; Regine gets tickets to the Brian McKnight concert.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Stressed-out Khadijah consults a psychologist; Overton fears clowns.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: Two pregnant sisters eagerly anticipate raising babies together until one mother winds up dead in a creek; but this brutal crime is just the beginning, as police uncover a months-long betrayal and a desperate act carried out by an unlikely rival.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: He moved to New York to pursue the American dream, and became successful beyond his wildest imagination; but when a violent attack turns the dream into a nightmare, police must untangle a sinister web of financial crimes and murderous envy.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman has the world at her fingertips until a charming bad boy sweeps her off her feet.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: After escaping a bad relationship, a young woman thinks she has finally found Mr. Right; she quickly realizes her new man is actually worse than her ex.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A beautiful young bank teller falls head over heels for a starving musician; under his spell, she becomes willing to risk it all to help him rob the bank where she works.

programme.desc: Dwayne's date with Denise is interrupted when a despondent Whitley shows up.

programme.desc: Rudy becomes the star of a youth football team, but Cliff is worried about safety.

programme.desc: Denise's friend seeks medical advice from Cliff about a problem she is keeping from her parents.

programme.desc: Clair is determined not to let a broken toe interfere with her personal or professional life.

programme.desc: Cliff invites Theo's prim math teacher (Sonia Braga) to dinner.

programme.desc: Vanessa tries to hide her bad report card from her parents; she and Denise fight over a sweater.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Clair is determined to buy a valuable painting done by her great uncle at an auction.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo and his friend Cockroach are ill-prepared for an upcoming test on "Macbeth.".

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Rudy helps a friend overcome his fear of the dentist (Danny Kaye).

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's ex-musician dad (Earle Hyman) plans to come out of retirement to play trombone at a jam session in memory of an old friend; Rudy tells knock-knock jokes.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise is involved in an auto accident with a limousine carrying singer Stevie Wonder.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: When chaos rules in the Huxtable home, Cliff seeks refuge in his office.

programme.title: Ringside
programme.desc: Undefeated boxer Jaxon Holley (Tyler Lepley) prepares for the biggest fight of his life against a trash-talking champion (Allen Maldonado). He juggles training and personal battles and meets a beautiful, secretive photographer (Raney Branch).

programme.desc: A mysterious midnight call causes chaos in the Jefferson household.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A life-and-death situation grips the Jefferson household.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: When George forgets Mother Jefferson's birthday, Louise saves the day.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A publisher asks Louise to write a cookbook of "ghetto" recipes.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Helen and Tom get caught in a tight spot -- George's bathroom.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Lionel celebrates a bit too much after graduation.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The membership committee of an exclusive tennis club invites George to join.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George has big plans for a first-rate second wedding, but Louise is having second thoughts.

programme.desc: Deon Cole is uncensored about his road of trial and error to becoming an award-winning comedian and actor; he started doing stand up at a Chicago comedy club and became a household name.

programme.desc: After J.J. wins the lottery, he is faced with two gun-toting members of a girls' gang.

programme.desc: J.J. tries to lend a helping hand when Michael experiences his first great romance.

programme.desc: The children and Willona try to convince Florida to have some fun.

programme.desc: J.J. comes up with a vocal discovery that he calls the "great white hope.".
